lesson: A LOW MIX alarm with the pump audibly running and a full hopper points to a stuck feed valve, not a dead pump. Confirm the pump is actually running before condemning it.
symptoms: Barrel running out of mix quickly.
MIX LOW alarm despite a full hopper.
Mix pump can be heard running.

tests.error-log: MIX LOW alarm active. Pump runtime logs normal.
tests.temp-probe: Barrel temp rising — no mix replenishment. Hopper full.
tests.inspect-beater: Mix feed solenoid valve from hopper to barrel actuates but won't open — debris lodged in the valve seat.

flavour: The pump was keen. The valve had other ideas.
authenticityNote: Mix feed solenoid valves stick closed when debris lodges in the seat; the pump runs but delivers nothing to the barrel. Easy to confuse with pump failure until you confirm the pump is actually running.
